objective: On branch codex/lean-assumption-closure, implement the next Hegemon Lean formal-verification priorities end to end: replace certificate-only SmallWood soundness assumptions with concrete AIR/constraint-to-transaction semantic closure and adversarial drift gates; compose an honest accepted-chain no-counterfeit boundary including proof/artifact admission and supply accounting; narrow parser/native-node refinement on the security-critical raw-ingress-to-canonical-publication path; mechanize the active native-backend algebraic/canonicalization claims without overstating proof-of-knowledge; improve assumption-closure reporting; preserve runtime and testnet compatibility; run all focused and repository-required validation; security-review the final branch diff; push the branch; open a draft pull request; and drive all required GitHub checks green without merging.
measurement_method: Recompute the weighted average of config/highest-standard-formal-verification-matrix.json property completion percentages. The formal-surface percentage is valid only when measured in a stable paused, blocked, or complete goal state, every required property id and weight matches the fixed highest-standard theorem set, completed properties have no missing_work or remaining_work, completed properties list current evidence and explicit external assumptions, the matrix overall percent equals the recomputed weighted percent, and this ledger matches both. Mechanized assumption closure is recomputed separately against the checker's fixed track and closed-theorem policy; the public active-goal command also requires every credited theorem in the formal security claims set, verifies formal_source_tree_blake3 against the deterministic path-and-byte digest of every formal/lean/**/*.lean file, and runs aggregate Hegemon elaboration plus the axiom audit before emitting a passing result.
external_assumption_boundary: 100% here means complete under the checked matrix method with explicit named cryptographic assumptions, explicit proof-system assumptions, and explicit fail-closed system-model assumptions. It is not a claim of assumption-free primitive crypto, deployed proof-system soundness, DA retention, storage hardware semantics, external bridge soundness, global traffic-analysis privacy, scanner completeness, or live release-infrastructure honesty.
acceptance_gates: cargo run --quiet --manifest-path scripts/hegemon_formal_core/Cargo.toml -- check-blueprint config/formal-security-blueprint.json --claims config/formal-security-claims.json
